title: Saturday Open Shop
description: Bring your bike and use our tools and workspace. Volunteers available to help with repairs.

title: Wednesday Group Ride
description: Casual group ride through Rapid City. All skill levels welcome. 15-25 mile route.

title: Earn-A-Bike Workshop
description: Learn bike repair skills and earn your own bicycle. 6-session program starts here.

title: Bicycle Safety Class
description: Learn road safety, hand signals, and basic maintenance. Free helmets for attendees.

title: Spring Kickoff Social
description: Celebrate the start of riding season. Meet fellow cyclists and plan the year ahead.

title: Gravel Pursuit 2026
description: Annual gravel race through the Black Hills. 60k course with full support.

title: Youth Bike Camp
description: Week-long camp for ages 8-16. Learn repair, safety, and trail riding.

title: Dakota 50 Gravel
description: 50-mile gravel race with beautiful Black Hills scenery.
